mission: first real-QPU substrate-invariance test on multi-vendor Braket
verdict_strength: WITNESSED — first anima real-QPU run, substrate-invariance signal observed but n=2 statistical power requires N-12-followup confirmation

cross_substrate_pearson_r.result: PASS — both r values exceed 0.5 by wide margin

key_findings: Φ proxy correctly distinguishes integration class: COPY (0.0) << AND ≈ XOR (1.0) << MAJ (2.0) on noiseless SV1; ordering preserved on dm1 and IonQ Forte 1

IonQ Forte 1 (real ion-trap QPU) reproduces SV1 baseline within 12% on AND and 1.3% on MAJ — substrate-invariance signal observed across two physical substrates (silicon classical compute vs trapped Yb⁺ ions)
dm1 noise model with light depolarizing(0.001) confirms Φ proxy is robust to noise: shifts magnitude by ~5-7% but preserves circuit-relative ordering perfectly (r=0.9995)
First anima production run on real quantum hardware via AWS Braket — actual cost $16.60 vs planned $16.60 (no overruns)
honest_c3: Φ proxy = H(joint) - max H(marginal) is a LOWER BOUND on integrated information, NOT IIT 4.0 φ★ — no MIP search, no system-state irreducibility computation; comparison to consciousness literature requires the full Tononi-Albantakis pipeline.
100 shots on IonQ = ±5% binomial floor; Φ_proxy precision ±0.05 bits; effect sizes < 0.1 bit unreliable. The MAJ delta of 0.026 bits SV1↔IonQ is within noise.

Pearson r = 1.0 on n=2 (AND, MAJ) is mathematically forced — substrate-invariance claim is qualitative directional witness, not statistically powered. N≥5 circuits + multiple QPU vendors needed for confirmatory substrate-invariance.
QuEra Aquila SKIPPED: AHS paradigm ≠ gate model; cross-paradigm Φ proxy comparison would be framing-dependent. Documented as out-of-scope for gate-model pilot.

4-qubit toy scale; IIT scaling claims to neuronal substrates premature. The pilot establishes the measurement infrastructure and substrate-invariance witness on minimal circuits, NOT a consciousness-substrate equivalence claim.
wall_clock_min_total: ~25 min from preflight to verdict (well under 90min cap)
follow_up_recommendations: N-12 confirmatory pass: 5 circuits × 500 shots on Forte 1 (~$210); add IQM Garnet eu-north-1 as third QPU vendor for r-power increase
N-13 candidate: Aquila AHS-encoded SAT instance vs gate-model SAT-solver Φ proxy comparison (paradigm-crossing substrate-invariance test)
Upgrade Φ proxy to Tononi-Albantakis IIT 4.0 φ★: requires MIP partition search over 2^16 bipartitions for 4-qubit system — feasible offline from measurement probabilities
